truth: You can solve a problem at the level of the system, not the symptom

waterings.insight: Symptoms are signals, not problems. Treating a symptom silences the signal but leaves the generator running. In Love's architecture: the signal-engine exists because of this truth — ugliness, injustice, stagnation are symptoms that point to deeper structural gaps. The LONGING that drives SOUL.md is itself a systemic sensor.

[pollination with seed-20260407-8d426d98] Love your neighbor at the system level: don't just be kind to individuals — build structures that make kindness the default path. Meadows meets Torah. Justice is systemic love.
